rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings.
AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at appropriate component or implementation scopes.
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches in AGREE contracts.
Use boolean expressions for range checks in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use the syntax `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE annex blocks outside of component type or implementation scopes.
Avoid type mismatches by ensuring helper declarations match the types of their expressions.
